title: abutilon multiflorum
intro: Abutilon multiflorum, also known as Indian mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the family Malvaceae, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Abutilon multiflorum include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Abutilon multiflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
